issue.title: [bug]: Base UI Button as link has wrong role
issue.body:
### Describe the bug

I first reported this as an issue in Base UI, but this is expected behaviour on their side.
https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/4021

They'll likely show a warning about this in a future release:
https://github.com/mui/base-ui/pull/3423

### Affected component/components

Button

### How to reproduce

You can inspect the Button here and see the role is "button", even though it's semantically a link.
https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components/base/button#link-1

### Codesandbox/StackBlitz link

N/A

### Logs

N/A

### System Info

N/A

### Before submitting

- [x] I've made research efforts and searched the documentation
- [x] I've searched for existing issues
